What We Do
Professional Window Cleaning
for Every Property

From single-story homes to multi-story commercial buildings, Lets Do It Details delivers spotless results using professional-grade equipment and eco-safe solutions.

🏠

Residential Cleaning

Full interior and exterior window cleaning for homes throughout Irvine and Tustin. We treat your home like our own — careful, thorough, and respectful.

🏢

Commercial Cleaning

Storefronts, office buildings, and retail spaces. Regular maintenance programs available to keep your business looking its best year-round.

🌊

Screen & Track Cleaning

We don't just clean the glass — we clean window screens, tracks, and sills for a truly complete finish that lasts longer.

🧪

Hard Water Removal

Southern California's mineral-rich water leaves stubborn stains. Our specialized treatment removes hard water deposits without damaging glass.

✨

Post-Construction Clean

Construction dust, paint overspray, and adhesive residue don't stand a chance. Perfect for new builds and remodels in the OC area.

📅

Recurring Plans

Monthly, bi-monthly, or quarterly plans available. Set it and forget it — we'll keep your windows sparkling on a schedule that works for you.

Why LetsDoIt Details
Local. Reliable. Spotless.

We're not a national chain — we're your neighbors. That means we show up on time, take pride in our work, and stand behind every job.

01

Streak-Free Guarantee

If you're not 100% happy with the results, we come back and fix it at no charge. Simple as that.

02

Eco-Safe Solutions

We use biodegradable, non-toxic cleaning solutions that are safe for your family, pets, and OC's waterways.

03

Locally Owned

Proudly serving Irvine and Tustin since day one. We know the area, the water conditions, and what your windows need.
